name: memtrace-monorepo
description: Collaborative memory hub with knowledge graph, trust scoring, and decay - for teams and AI agents.

scripts.test:api: docker compose exec -T api python -m pytest tests/ -v 2>/dev/null || env APP_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///test.db SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-at-least-32-characters PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/private/tmp/pycache packages/api/venv/bin/python -m pytest packages/api/tests -v || (cd packages/api && python3 -m pytest tests/ -v)
